title: Aninerel ANL-4200T-24L-W-PRO (tested controls, unvalidated voltage windows)

capabilities.note: 24 V unit: the exact setpoint limits for this model are undocumented, so the window deliberately spans both battery classes and the inverter's own write validation is the authority; a rejected write surfaces as a capability block.

This firmware generation uses a five-value output-priority enum (vendor app field bse_eybond_read_55); the family's three-value SMG enum mislabeled it (register read 3 = SUB).
capabilities.support_notes: Enum from the tester's vendor-app field definitions (2026-07-05); write not yet confirmed.

capabilities.note: This firmware generation uses charger-priority values 1-3 (vendor app field bat_eybond_read_74); there is no value 0.
